app.title: Web Page Downloader
app.noInternet: No internet connection - cannot download external resources
app.enableHtmlForOffline: Please enable HTML download or single file mode for offline use
app.networkCheckFailed: Network connectivity check failed - continuing with download
app.noUrl: Error: No URL provided for download
app.downloadInProgress: A download is already in progress. Please wait.
app.memoryPressure: Cannot start download due to critical memory pressure. Please try again later.
app.panelUnavailable: Download could not complete because the extension panel was closed or became unavailable. Please keep this panel open while downloading and try again.
app.panelUnavailableTip: To prevent this, keep this panel open and avoid switching tabs during the download.

filter.title: Filter out what you want to download
filter.fullWebsiteDescription: Best for complex websites (downloads the first level of linked pages)
filter.zipDescription: Saves the full page structure as a ZIP archive
filter.linksWarning: If you choose to download links, you have to take into account that the total download time can increase dramatically and the zip file can be significantly larger.
filter.permissionWarning: Filter preferences won't be saved without storage permission
filter.ariaDownloadAssets: Download assets like CSS and JS
filter.ariaDownloadDocuments: Download documents like PDF and DOC
filter.ariaSingleFile: Download as a single HTML file
filter.fullScrapingInfo: Opens linked pages sequentially in this tab to capture dynamic content and assets. You'll see each page load during the process.

status.memoryLimitError: Download failed due to memory limits. Attempting cleanup...
status.networkError: Download failed due to network issues. Please check your connection.
status.memoryCleanupPerformed: Memory cleanup performed. Please try downloading again with fewer options selected.
status.htmlAssembled: HTML content assembled and added to download
status.largeHtmlAssembled: Large HTML content processed and added to download
status.htmlAssemblyError: Error during HTML assembly, falling back to regular processing
status.waitingForCleanup: Waiting for memory cleanup before part {{part}}...
status.downloadCompleteZipInstruction: Download complete! Open the .zip file to extract the whole website.
status.cssError: Error downloading CSS files - some may be missing
status.jsError: Error downloading JS files - some may be missing
status.zipLocation: Your file has been saved locally.

status.bgImagesSummary: Background images from CSS downloaded: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed, {{skipped}} skipped
status.jsSummary: JS files downloaded: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed, {{skipped}} skipped
status.documentsSummary: Document files downloaded: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed, {{skipped}} skipped
status.htmlSummary: HTML files downloaded: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed, {{skipped}} skipped
status.streamingCss: Starting streaming download for large CSS: {{current}}/{{total}}
status.cssStreamingSummary: CSS files processed: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{streamed}} streamed, {{failed}} failed
status.streamingJs: Starting streaming download for large JS: {{current}}/{{total}}
status.jsStreamingSummary: JS files processed: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{streamed}} streamed, {{failed}} failed
status.streamingImages: Starting streaming download for large image: {{current}}/{{total}}
status.imagesStreamingSummary: Images processed: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{streamed}} streamed, {{failed}} failed, {{skipped}} skipped
status.streamingFailedFallback: Streaming download failed, falling back to regular download...
status.processingHtmlIncremental: Processing HTML content with incremental assembly
status.htmlTooLarge: HTML content is too large, may be truncated
status.skippingHtmlSizeLimit: Skipping HTML due to size limit: {{link}}
status.incrementalHtmlAdded: HTML content assembled and added to download
status.largeHtmlAdded: Large HTML content processed and added to download
status.waitingForStreaming: Waiting for {{count}} streaming downloads to complete...
status.creatingStreamingZip: Creating ZIP file with streaming content...
status.linkedPagesComplete: Linked pages scraping completed: {{succeeded}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed

storage.title: Storage Permission Required
storage.description: This extension needs storage permission to save your filter preferences and provide a better experience.

global.title: Permissions Required
global.description: This extension needs storage permission to provide the best download experience.

storage.title: Storage Permission:
storage.description: Allows the extension to save small amounts of data locally in your browser. This enables us to remember your preferences and provide a personalized experience across sessions.

privacy.title: Privacy:
privacy.local: All data stays local in your browser

generated.readme:
MULTI-PART DOWNLOAD
===================
This website has been split into {{total}} parts for download.

EXTRACTION INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Download all {{total}} parts (files ending in .zip)
2. Create a new folder for the website
3. Extract each ZIP file into the SAME folder
4. All files will merge into the correct directory structure
5. Open index.html to view the website

This is Part {{part}} of {{total}}

extraction.alertMessage: Before extracting the ZIP file, please install a proper extraction program. Default system tools have significant limitations when handling multipart (split) ZIP files and may fail to extract correctly.

rating.title: Enjoying this extension?
rating.description: Please rate us on the Chrome Web Store!
